projectDescription: A lightweight template for organizing reviewed links, tools, repos, and research signals using Raindrop and ChatGPT — turning bookmarks into structured decisions.
keyFeatures: Structured decision notes: every saved link gets a Verdict, Next, Claim, Evidence, Authority, Truth, and StackFit field
Controlled tag taxonomy with approved families (status/*, truth/*, fit/*, next/*, and more)
Five-collection Raindrop structure: SYSTEM, INBOX, REVIEW, LIBRARY, ARCHIVE
Agent contract that enforces strict operator-gate: AI proposes, human decides
StackFit model for evaluating realistic adoption cost and compatibility
Golden examples for canonical classification patterns
Customizable tag families, domains, and item types for personal workflows
Works with ChatGPT + Raindrop MCP or any Raindrop-connected AI assistant
publicApiSurface: Note template fields: Cataloged, Verdict, Next, Claim, Evidence, Authority, Truth, StackFit
Tag families: authority/*, truth/*, status/*, type/*, domain/*, source/*, scenario/*, risk/*, stack/*, fit/*, next/*, priority/*
Status values: dissect, ready, later, core-good, watch, rejected, reference, pending-review
Next values: test, spike, extract, revisit, archive, deploy
Truth values: verified, plausible, claimed, conflicting, outdated, unknown
Authority values: official, source-code, community, vendor-claim, internal
Fit tags: fit/windows, fit/vscode, fit/ai-assisted, fit/llm-chat, fit/mcp, fit/local, fit/free-tier-real, fit/no-card, fit/paywall-risk, fit/dev-heavy, fit/discovery-only
Ingestion flow: save to INBOX -> assistant researches -> operator validates -> move to REVIEW/LIBRARY/ARCHIVE
Connector description template for ChatGPT Raindrop integration
System bookmark link placeholder URL pattern
